clause_text: This provision applies only to Location 001, Building 001, Building when BPF 00 13 edition 12 23 is attached to the policy.
The scheduled limit of $60,000 and deductible of $1,000 apply to Location 001, Building 001, Building under form BPF 00 13 edition 12 23.
